subcodes.first_line: O my God! O my God! Thou knowest, verily, that my heart is replete… O ye friends of God and assistants of Abdu'l-Baha: When the Sun of Truth was concealed... I ask one favor of all the friends of God: It is the wish of my soul
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انک لتعلم ان قلبی ممتلا بحب احبائک و روحی متعلق بروح اصفیائک و صدری
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @Ascension of Baha'u'llah, @growth of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
